parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)                          AS total_orders,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0)    AS total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)       AS unique_customers,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status='voided' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS voided_orders
FROM orders
WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Completed')   AS completed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Ready for Pickup') AS ready_pickup,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Under Repair') AS in_progress,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Awaiting Parts') AS awaiting_parts,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE) AS new_today
FROM repairs;

SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.qty) AS units_sold, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
WHERE DATE(o.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND o.status != 'voided'
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS critical_alerts
FROM battery_alerts
WHERE acknowledged_at IS NULL
  AND alert_type IN ('SHELF_LIMIT_EXCEEDED', 'CRITICAL_AGE');
